assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_029",
  "rule_id": "Ensure All World-Writable Directories Are Owned by root User",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.92,
  "rationale": "The issue is limited to directory ownership; remediation only changes ownership and does not affect boot process or critical services, making it safe to apply automatically.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "Potential exploitation of world-writable directories",
    "Improper permissions could allow privilege escalation"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Execute the provided remediation script on targeted systems",
    "Run verification command to confirm all affected directories are owned by root",
    "Reboot is not required"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": false,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": true
}
